title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Niva Bupa - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Niva Bupa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
